---
title: "Edgar Gonzalez Martinez"
image: IMG_1774.jpeg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/edgargm
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/CheddyG
---

Welcome to my portfolio! I am a recent UCSB Statistics and Data Science graduate with experience in time series modeling, machine learning, and applied statistical analysis. Below are some of my recent projects. Check them out!

## Featured Projects

### [Ventura County Wildfire Time Series](https://cheddyg.github.io/Ventura-County-Wildfire-Analysis/)
Investigation into Ventura County wildfire occurrence using NOAA and NASA POWER datasets. 
Develops SARIMA and ARMAX frameworks incorporating drought index lags, vapor pressure 
deficit, and temperature predictors.

* **Keywords:** R, SARIMA, ARMAX, NASA POWER, Environmental Modeling

### [Pokémon Tournament Simulation Tool](https://cheddyg.github.io/PWT-Simulation-Tournament/)
Python data pipeline that parses tournament structure, simulates match mechanics, and 
analyzes competitive trainer data.

<!-- * **Keywords:** Python, Simulation, Exploratory Data Analysis -->

---

## Technical Skills

* **Languages:** R, Python, SQL, Git/Bash
* **Libraries:** tidyverse, forecast, scikit-learn, pandas, ggplot2
* **Methodologies:** Time Series Forecasting, Regression Analysis, Simulation Modeling, 
  Dimensionality Reduction (PCA)
* **Tools:** Quarto, GitHub Pages, LaTeX
